figures.caption: Table 1: Tukey results for category comparisons.

Figure 1. Human baseline vs. all LLM–temperatures. Entropy (A), Distance N (B), and Distance C (C). The leftmost group shows humans, followed by LLM outputs grouped by model; Claude Sonnet 4.5; Gemini 2.5 Pro; and GPT-4o. Vertical dashed lines separate model families. Gray points show individual observations; boxplots show medians and interquartile ranges. Circles indicate estimated marginal means (± 95% CI); within each model family, line color intensity increases with temperature (lighter = T = 0.0, darker = T = 1.0). Brackets denote Tukey-adjusted contrasts against the human baseline (* p < .05, ** p < .01, *** p < .001, **** p < .0001). All plots in high quality are provided in Supplementary Materials.
